narrative:
Bowling Green 3-D (precinct in Wood County) has 1,142 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.8 percentage points.
